decisions.summary: Scope reviewability accepted for UI/UX responsive/a11y evidence matrix workflow
decisions.reason: scope_reviewed=true; decision_record=accepted; changed files are one VibePro UI/UX evidence workflow spanning CLI command, matrix generator, PR summary wiring, tests, Story/Spec/Architecture, and Design SSOT lineage. review_owner_map=one reviewer can evaluate the same contract end to end: missing route/viewport/state/git-head/a11y evidence must stay explicit, visual residual remains authoritative, and PR prepare surfaces the matrix. Splitting implementation from docs/registry would stale current-head evidence and reduce reviewability.

decisions.summary: Keep responsive/a11y evidence matrix implementation, tests, and Design SSOT lineage in one cohesive Story PR.
decisions.reason: The changed files are one VibePro UI/UX evidence workflow contract: CLI command, matrix generator, PR summary projection, UIEA tests, Story/Spec/Architecture docs, and Design SSOT registration. Splitting docs/registry from source would make the gate evidence stale and reduce reviewability rather than isolate an unrelated decision.
